data.title: E Split Corp. Class A and Preferred Distributions
data.description: In Toronto on March 24, 2026, E Split Corp. (listed on TSX as ENS and ENS.PR.A) revealed that it will distribute payments to Class A shareholders for March 2026.

data.title: Infrastructure Dividend Split Corp. Class A Distributions
data.description: On March 24, 2026, Infrastructure Dividend Split Corp. (TSX:IS) declared a distribution for March 2026, which will be paid to Class A shareholders. The specific payout amounts were not disclosed in the provided information.

data.title: Telligen Honored with the Richard L. Doyle Award for Innovative 'Blue-Ribbon' Prior Authorization Program
data.description: A renowned company specializing in population health management has gained national acclaim for its provider incentive program. MCG Health, a key component of the Hearst Health network and a leading authority in reliable clinical guidance, has revealed its partnership with Telligen on March 24, 2026, in Seattle. This recognition highlights the success of their initiative in encouraging providers, with significant impact nationwide.

data.title: Notice of Annual General Meeting in ASSA ABLOY AB
data.description: Invitations have been sent out for the Annual General Meeting of ASSA ABLOY AB (Reg. No. 556059-3575), scheduled to take place on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 3:30 p.m., at 7A Posthuset, Vasagatan 28, 111 20 Stockholm, Sweden. Shareholders of the company are encouraged to attend this important meeting.

data.title: Bitcoin Ping Pongs Around $70,000 As Trump Headlines Drive Volatility
data.description: The price of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is currently hovering between $69,000 and $71,000 amidst fluctuating comments from President Donald Trump regarding the Iran conflict. Financial analyst Scott Melker, dubbed "The Wolf of All Streets," observed that global markets are experiencing heightened turbulence due to conflicting geopolitical news, resulting in trillions of dollars being rapidly gained and lost in equities. Despite this instability, Bitcoin has demonstrated resilience by maintaining a steady position within this price range. Melker highlighted... (remaining details available elsewhere)

data.title: Blockchain company shares update on progress post IPO via shareholder letter.
data.description: Last month, a record number of 572,000 new jobs were added to the economy, exceeding expectations and leading to a decrease in the unemployment rate to 4.6%. This marks the lowest unemployment rate since the beginning of the pandemic. The strong job growth was seen across various sectors including leisure and hospitality, professional and business services, and manufacturing. Additionally, wages saw a 0.6% increase compared to the previous month, indicating positive momentum in the labor market. Overall, these numbers reflect a promising outlook for the economy as it continues to recover from the impact of the pandemic.

data.title: CrowdStrike Launches Flex for Services, Bringing Flexible Cybersecurity Services Consumption to the Agentic Era
data.description: CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) unveiled two new initiatives at RSA 2026 in Austin, Texas and San Francisco. The first, Flex for Services, expands their Falcon Flex licensing model to include expert-led security services. This allows organizations to leverage a range of services such as AI advisory and incident response, powered by the Falcon platform. The second initiative is the Zero Dollar Flex Fund, established in partnership with their global ecosystem. These initiatives aim to provide on-demand access to essential services, further enhancing CrowdStrike's offerings for its customers.

data.title: LinkSquares CLM Earns Top Satisfaction Rating in G2 Spring Grid® Report for CLM
data.description: In G2's Spring 2026 Grid for Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM), LinkSquares has achieved the top ranking for user satisfaction. Renowned as a Leader in the industry, LinkSquares has outperformed competitors in user feedback and overall customer experience. G2, a respected platform for software reviews, has commended LinkSquares for its exceptional performance and high customer satisfaction ratings. This recognition highlights LinkSquares' commitment to providing top-tier CLM solutions and underscores its leading position in the market.

data.title: Dealership Buy/Sell Market Set New Record in 2025 as Consolidation Accelerated and Blue Sky Values Rose
data.description: In Incline Village, Nevada, the auto dealership buy/sell market achieved a new milestone in 2025 with a total of 458 transactions, involving the sale of 688 franchises. This marked a 5% growth compared to the previous year. The recently published 2025 Blue Sky Report® by Kerrigan Advisors revealed that ongoing buyer interest, robust earnings, and a persistent trend of consolidation were key factors behind the heightened activity in the buy/sell market. As a result, blue sky values in 2025 soared. Notably, within the last five years, the US saw over 3,500 franchise transactions, underscoring the industry's buoyant performance.

data.title: What's Going On With Palantir Shares On Tuesday?
data.description: Palantir Technologies (PLTR) stocks are experiencing a decrease during Tuesday's premarket trading session due to a decrease in risk appetite in the equities market. Nasdaq futures are down by 0.22% and S&P 500 futures have dropped by 0.25%. The Technology sector is slightly lower, putting pressure on high-multiple AI software companies. The decline comes after a recent rally in Palantir stock driven by positive geopolitical developments and a significant military contract announcement. President Donald Trump's decision to halt planned U.S. strikes for five days contributed to the market's recovery. Trump's positive discussions with Iranian officials, described as "very good and productive" on Truth Social, eased tensions following a weekend ultimatum concerning the Strait of Hormuz. Furthermore, the Pentagon is set to officially adopt Palantir's Maven Smart System following a directive issued by Deputy Secretary of Defense Steve Feinberg on March 9, providing the company with long-term funding stability.
